sql:
-- OMOP cohort characterization SQL generated by RWE-Gen
-- This SQL is populated only. It is not executed by this module.
WITH
target AS (
    SELECT
        index_event.person_id,
        index_event.index_date,
        person.gender_concept_id,
        person.year_of_birth,
        person.month_of_birth,
        person.day_of_birth
    FROM (
        SELECT
            cohort_event.person_id,
            MIN(cohort_event.condition_start_date) AS index_date
        FROM condition_occurrence cohort_event
        WHERE cohort_event.condition_concept_id IN (433736)
        GROUP BY cohort_event.person_id
    ) index_event
    JOIN person ON person.person_id = index_event.person_id
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(index_event.index_date, MAKE_DATE(person.year_of_birth, COALESCE(person.month_of_birth, 1), COALESCE(person.day_of_birth, 1)))) >= 18 AND person.gender_concept_id IN (8507, 8532) AND ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM condition_occurrence evt WHERE evt.person_id = index_event.person_id AND evt.condition_concept_id IN (320128) AND evt.condition_start_date <= index_event.index_date + INTERVAL '0 day') >= 1)
)
SELECT
    'Adults with obesity and hypertension' AS population_label,
    COUNT(*) AS cohort_size,
    AVG(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(index_date, MAKE_DATE(year_of_birth, COALESCE(month_of_birth, 1), COALESCE(day_of_birth, 1))))) AS mean_age_at_index,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_concept_id = 8507 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_concept_id = 8532 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender_concept_id NOT IN (8507, 8532) OR gender_concept_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unknown_sex_count
FROM target;
